function.name: memu.store
function.description: Store a memory in memU long-term memory system. Stores conversations, facts, preferences, and observations about users.

function.name: memu.retrieve
function.description: Retrieve relevant memories from memU via semantic search. Returns scored memories ranked by relevance to the query.

query.description: Semantic search query — describe what you want to recall

function.name: memu.clear
function.description: Clear all stored memories for a specific agent/user pair

user_id.description: User ID to clear memories for

function.name: memory_search
function.description: Search local memory files in the memory/ directory for specific information. Searches journal entries, people profiles, instructions, and other stored context.

query.description: Search query — a name, topic, or keyword to find in memory files

file.description: Specific memory file to search (e.g. 'people.md', 'quick-facts.md'). Omit to search all.

function.name: journal.write
function.description: Write a journal entry capturing thoughts, reflections, or observations

function.name: message.send
function.description: Send a message to a user on any connected channel (Signal, WhatsApp, etc.) with optional media attachment

to.description: Recipient — phone number (e.g. '+15551234567') or user ID

media.description: Path to media file to attach (image, audio, video)

channel.description: Channel to send on (default: same channel as received)

function.name: session.send
function.description: Delegate a task to another agent by sending a message to their session. Use when a task is better handled by a specialist agent.

message.description: Task or message for the target agent

function.name: image.generate
function.description: Generate an image using one of the available image generation backends

backend.description: Which image generator to use (default: grok)

nsfw.description: Whether NSFW content is allowed (only novita supports this)
